overall.description: A static cinematic shot from Cyberpunk 2077 showcasing a futuristic city waterfront. The scene contrasts dense, colorful slum buildings along the riverbank with towering corporate skyscrapers and industrial structures in the background, viewed from an elevated vantage point under a clear blue sky with visible smoke plumes rising from distant chimneys.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city waterfront with slum district and corporate skyline

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the cityscape from a fixed elevated vantage point overlooking the river

entered.detail: Wide river with murky green water flowing through the foreground of the scene
Dense cluster of colorful low-rise buildings with makeshift construction and vibrant rooftops along the riverbank
Large red structural bridge spanning the river with visible support pillars
Multi-level highway infrastructure crossing horizontally through the mid-ground connecting buildings
Cluster of towering futuristic skyscrapers with glass and steel facades dominating the background
Smokestacks emitting white steam and smoke plumes rising among the skyscrapers

segments.scene_description: A static panoramic view of a cyberpunk city waterfront, showing the stark contrast between the colorful dense slum buildings on the right and the towering corporate skyscrapers in the background. The river flows calmly in the foreground with a large red bridge visible on the left, while industrial smoke rises from distant chimneys under a clear blue sky. The camera remains fixed throughout, capturing the atmospheric detail of the urban environment without any movement or action.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, panoramic vista of a cyberpunk waterfront that emphasizes the stark contrast between urban decay and corporate opulence. It begins by capturing the colorful, dense slum buildings clustered along the right riverbank, set against a backdrop of towering corporate skyscrapers. As the eye moves across the frame, the scene expands to reveal a calm river in the foreground and a large red bridge anchoring the left side of the composition. The view then shifts toward the horizon, where industrial smoke plumes rise from distant chimneys into a clear blue sky. Finally, the camera remains fixed, allowing the atmospheric details of the sprawling city to settle into a single, cohesive urban landscape.
